# **How to Install ‘Stars Align’?**

While the game itself is not completed, I will walk you through the basic steps of how to download a game on the two platforms (Itch.io and Steam, where ‘Stars Align’ will be available once it is completed. I will be using two example games ‘Ignore the blackbird’ and ‘Doki Doki Literature Club’, that are similar to ‘Stars Align’ in aesthetic and gameplay.



# **How to Play the Game on Itch.io?**

1) Go to the [Itch.io](http://Itch.io) page. Search for the game you are interested in. Since ‘Stars Align’ is not out yet, I will show you the search for a similar style of game, ‘Ignore the blackbird’.

![][image1]

2) Once you enter the game’s page you can play the game online by pressing the ‘Run game’ button. This will let you play the game in your browser.

![][image2]

3) If you want to download the game, scroll to the bottom of the page until you see the following buttons. Click download.

![][image3]

4) This will download a zip file onto your computer. Right click on the file, and select ‘Extract All’.

![][image4]

5) Once the file is unzipped, enter the unzipped folder and double click on the ‘Application’ file and the game will launch.

![][image5]



# **How to Play the Game on Steam?**

1) Install Steam by going to Steam’s [webpage](https://store.steampowered.com/).

![][image6]

2) Click through the steps to install Steam (it will have a built-in guide), and then go to the Store and search for the game you want to play. In our case it would be ‘Stars Align’, but since ‘Stars Align’ is not complete yet, I will show the steps for a game in a similar style, made in the same game engine, ‘Doki Doki Literature Club’.

![][image7]

3) Select the game that you are searching for.

![][image8]

4) Once you enter the game’s Steam page, scroll down to where you can see the following screen. Click on ‘play game’ and the game will install automatically. When Steam asks if you want to create a shortcut to your desktop, select ‘yes’ for ease of access. 

Since ‘Stars Align’ will be a free game it will also say ‘Free: Play Game’. Other games that cost money will require you to input credit card information before downloading them, since you would have to make a purchase. ![][image9]

5) Once the game is installed, locate it on your computer, double click and the game will launch.
